ai.hero_title: AI reads papers with full text and figures
ai.hero_text: Select a paper and ask AI — it combines full text and figures to help you understand the content.
ai.help_turns_desc: Each paper supports up to 5 consecutive turns. Clear the conversation to start over.
ai.help_role_desc: Invoke a saved role prompt from settings, e.g. @StrictEvidence.
ai.config_desc: Current AI and extraction service settings. Go to Settings if not configured.
ai.search_placeholder: Filter by title, filename, abstract, notes, or tags
ai.session_hint_empty: No conversation yet. Select a paper to start asking.
ai.question_label: What would you like AI to help with?
ai.role_prompt_hint: Type @RoleName to invoke a role prompt, or click a shortcut below to insert.
ai.role_prompt_hint_empty: No role prompts configured. Add one in Settings, then use @RoleName here.
ai.question_placeholder: e.g. @StrictEvidence Explain the core conclusions and which figures are most important.
ai.config_ai_ready: AI QA is ready. You can start asking questions.
ai.config_ai_not_ready: Please configure the QA model and API Key in Settings first.
ai.config_pdf_not_ready: PDF extraction service not configured. Manual annotation required after upload.
ai.config_entry_desc: Configure AI models and PDF extraction service in Settings.
ai.empty_no_papers: No papers available for AI Reader.
ai.no_summary: This paper has no abstract or notes yet.
ai.session_hint_no_paper: Select a paper for AI Reader before starting a conversation.
ai.session_hint_generating: Generating turn ${round} response. Output streams in real time.
ai.session_hint_stopped: Generation stopped. This segment is not included in conversation history.
ai.session_hint_limit: This paper has reached the 5-turn limit. Clear the conversation to continue.
ai.session_hint_ongoing: This paper has ${count} turns so far. The next question will include prior context.
ai.session_hint_ready: No conversation yet. Context will be preserved after the first question.
ai.empty_no_questions: No questions yet. Try asking about conclusions, methods, limitations, or specific passages.
ai.turn_sending_context: Sending full text, figures, and context to the model.
ai.msg_configure_model: Please configure the QA model in Settings first
ai.msg_limit_reached: This paper has reached the 5-turn limit. Clear the conversation first.
ai.msg_no_exportable_md: No exportable Markdown content in this response
ai.msg_no_saveable_content: No saveable content in this response
ai.msg_note_already_saved: This turn has already been saved to paper notes
ai.msg_note_appended: AI content appended to paper notes
